mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_statistics ( user_id, item_id, order_count, total_amount, statistics_date, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{itemId}, #{orderCount}, #{totalAmount}, #{statisticsDate}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO order_statistics ( user_id, item_id, order_count, total_amount, statistics_date, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.itemId}, #{item.orderCount}, #{item.totalAmount}, #{item.statisticsDate}, NOW(), NOW() )
